texto: Catholic education and law schools provide me with a lot of miserable people as psychotherapy clients. I should be grateful. These people are looking for rescue from their education.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Brad Blanton sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “Catholic education and law schools provide me with a lot of miserable people as psychotherapy cli…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, education, therapy, útil em momentos de therapy.

texto: According to Hugh Thomas, author of 'A History of the World', the greatest medical advance in history has been garbage collection. The greatest psychological advance in history is just around the corner and will also have to do with cleaning up. Cleaning up lies and "coming out of the closet" is getting more attention these days. Some day we will look back on these years of suffocation in bullsh*t in the same way we look back on all the years people lived in, and died from, their garbage.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Brad Blanton sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “According to Hugh Thomas, author of 'A History of the World', the greatest medical advance in his…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, ego, honesty, útil em momentos de honesty e lies.
